title: Jetpackino
description: Adds Chattini with jetpacks as Allay models!
body:
Adds Chattini with jetpacks as Allay models!
\
Contains 3 variants, cyan, pink, "emo"
\
\
In order to see them, you must name an allay with one of the following names:
\
\
Cyan:  Chattini chattini CHATTINI Chattino chattino CHATTINO\
Pink:  Chattina chattina CHATTINA\
Emo:   .-. ,-, '-' :| :( ): |:        


## Required Mods:
[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/hX4kT2fu) (Only tested with 2.1.3)\
[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/version/O3jDICoH) (Only tested with 6.1.3)\
\
or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/) (not tested with)\
\
Both EMF and ETF are included in the optimization modpack [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).\
[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) can also be downloaded through [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/).\
Shader used on the images is [Complementary Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-reimagined).
## Disclaimer
This pack complies with [Hololive/Cover](https://hololivepro.com/en/terms/) derivative work guidelines.\
You are free to use it in any livestream/video, modpack or server, as long as you follow [Cover](https://hololivepro.com/en/terms/) rules.
